title: DocumentInsight
description: A rollup of activity counts for a document over a daily or weekly period.

date.description: The UTC day the rollup represents. For weekly rollups this is the first day (Monday) of the week.

period.description: The length of time the rollup covers. Daily rollups are stored for recent activity, older rollups are aggregated into weekly buckets.

viewCount.description: Total number of document views on this day.

viewerCount.description: Number of unique viewers on this day.

commentCount.description: Total comments made on this day.

reactionCount.description: Total reactions added on this day.

revisionCount.description: Number of document revisions on this day.

editorCount.description: Number of unique editors on this day.
